steps.title: Find the marker cost
steps.content:
Olivia bought $11$ packages of markers at $4$ dollars per package:
$$
11\cdot 4=44
$$
So she spent $44$ dollars on markers.

steps.title: Use the remaining money
steps.content: Subtract the marker cost from the total: $$ 68-44=24 $$ Each folder costs $1$ dollar, so the remaining $24$ dollars buys $24$ folders. The answer is 24.
